WITH customer_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        o.customer_id,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS num_orders,
        AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment_per_order,
        MAX(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) - MIN(julianday(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS days_span
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
),

WITH customer_payment_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    o.customer_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS num_orders,
    AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment,
    MAX(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS max_purchase,
    MIN(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS min_purchase
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
  GROUP BY o.customer_id
),

WITH customer_metrics AS (
    SELECT 
        o.customer_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS num_orders,
        AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment_per_order,
        CAST((julianday(MAX(o.order_purchase_timestamp)) - julianday(MIN(o.order_purchase_timestamp))) AS REAL) AS days_diff
    FROM orders o
    INNER JOIN order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
